items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue handbag is exquisite and elegant, further enriching the classic design. Crafted from black patent calfskin, the rounded flap features a refined curve and is accented with a vintage gold-finish metal CD turnlock, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Small size, with a pleated design and a refined silhouette, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_cn:
New Lady Dior 🌟 Lambskin Series
This Lady D-Joy handbag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. An elegant and classic style, crafted from nude pink lambskin, accented with light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm to elevate the look, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a removable chain strap and an adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Size 22cm

Premium Grade, High Version
【New Gold Flower💯 5-Grid Embroidery Lady】Lady Dior Embroidery Bag. The "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo is fashionable and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidery shoulder strap for versatile carrying options. Detachable double-sided embroidery wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Size: 24 cm x 20 cm x 11 cm

items.name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
【Gold Check❤ Medium Size】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. Perfect for storing daily essentials, it features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully embodying Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Golden Check Basket Bag
This basket-style handbag is eye-catching and stylish, blending practical functionality with an elegant silhouette. Adorned with fluorescent pink animal print embroidery throughout, the front is accented with a Christian Dior Paris logo to elevate the style. Spacious interior with a detachable matching zip pouch, and a detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Front accented with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable zip pouch with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 35 x 20.5 x 11 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, sunglasses, and 1 card holder

items.name_cn:
New Dior ❤️❤️
This Lady Dior handbag is exquisitely designed with a spacious interior. Crafted from white lambskin, it features a woven grid quilting and a "D.I.O.R." charm, showcasing a fashionable and classic charm. The multi-compartment design is practical for various daily items. The chain is embellished with beads, making it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody.
Front "D.I.O.R." charm
Flip-top closure
1 exterior compartment
1 interior compartment
1 zip pocket
1 slip pocket
6 card slots
Chain embellished with beads
Made in Italy
Style: 3105
19.5 x 12.5 x 5 cm
